title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> The Scribe gains a unique bonus—they
content:
✔ The Scribe gains a unique bonus—they may record and “rewrite” one event in the class that week.

📜 Scribe Perks:
✔ If standing neutral, they receive a minor XP bonus but cannot intervene.
✔ If joining the chaos, they gain access to secret knowledge but must accept one random buff/debuff.
✔ The Scribe must document the week’s major decisions.

✅ Why This Works:
• Adds an evolving narrative layer—each week’s story is recorded by the players.
• Creates an extra layer of agency—students decide whether to influence the game or stay safe.
• Mirrors the role of scribes in historical and literary contexts.

📜 3. Skill Check Complexity – Factoring in Character, Setting, and Buffs

📜 Skill checks will now factor in multiple real-time elements:
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 315 (chunk 315/555)
